501.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The people will continue to be in a good state as long as they hasten to break the fast.'
501.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang-orang akan terus berada dalam keadaan baik selama mereka menyegerakan berbuka puasa.'

502.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that two men disputed in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about which mosque had been founded on piety. One said it was the Prophet's mosque and the other said it was Quba mosque. They came to the Prophet ﷺ and asked him, and he said: 'It is this mosque of mine.'
502.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dua orang berselisih pada zaman Rasulullah ﷺ tentang masjid mana yang didirikan atas ketakwaan. Seorang berkata masjid Nabi dan yang lain berkata masjid Quba. Mereka mendatangi Nabi ﷺ dan bertanya, dan beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah masjidku ini.'

503.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that there was a dispute among some of the Ansar, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ went to settle it. When prayer time arrived, Abu Bakr led the prayer. The Prophet ﷺ arrived and motioned to Abu Bakr to stay, but Abu Bakr stepped back and the Prophet ﷺ stepped forward and led the prayer. Afterward he asked: 'O Abu Bakr, what prevented you from staying?' He said: 'It is not fitting for the son of Abi Quhafa to lead prayer in front of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
503.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa terjadi perselisihan di antara sebagian Ansar, dan Rasulullah ﷺ pergi untuk mendamaikan mereka. Ketika waktu shalat tiba, Abu Bakr memimpin shalat. Nabi ﷺ datang dan memberi isyarat kepada Abu Bakr untuk tetap di tempatnya, tetapi Abu Bakr mundur dan Nabi ﷺ maju dan memimpin shalat. Setelahnya beliau bertanya: 'Wahai Abu Bakr, apa yang mencegahmu untuk tetap?' Ia berkata: 'Tidaklah pantas bagi putra Abi Quhafa untuk memimpin shalat di depan Rasulullah ﷺ.'

504.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Beware of small sins, like a people who camped in a valley and one brought a stick and another brought a stick until they baked their bread. Small sins — when their doer is taken to account for them — will destroy him.'
504.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hati-hatilah dengan dosa-dosa kecil, seperti suatu kaum yang berkemah di lembah dan satu orang membawa ranting dan yang lain membawa ranting hingga mereka membakar roti mereka. Dosa-dosa kecil — ketika pelakunya dimintai pertanggungjawabannya — akan membinasakannya.'

505.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'My example and the example of the Hour is like a man sent by his people as a scout. When he feared he would be overtaken, he waved his garment: You are coming, you are coming. I am that scout.'
505.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Perumpamaanku dan perumpamaan Kiamat seperti seorang laki-laki yang diutus kaumnya sebagai pengintai. Ketika ia takut didahului, ia melambaikan bajunya: Mereka datang, mereka datang. Aku adalah pengintai itu.'

506.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that men would pray with the Prophet ﷺ with their lower garments tied around their necks like boys. The women were told: 'Do not raise your heads until the men have settled into the sitting position' — due to the shortness of their garments.
506.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa para laki-laki shalat bersama Nabi ﷺ dengan kain bawahan mereka diikatkan di leher mereka seperti anak-anak. Para wanita diperintahkan: 'Janganlah kalian mengangkat kepala kalian hingga para laki-laki telah duduk dengan sempurna' — karena pendeknya kain mereka.

507.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that Mount Uhud trembled when upon it were the Prophet ﷺ, Abu Bakr, 'Umar, and 'Uthman. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Be still, Uhud — for upon you is no one but a prophet, a truthful one (siddiq), and two martyrs.'
507.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Gunung Uhud berguncang ketika di atasnya terdapat Nabi ﷺ, Abu Bakr, 'Umar, dan 'Utsman. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tenanglah, Uhud — karena di atasmu tidak ada selain seorang nabi, seorang yang sangat jujur (siddiq), dan dua orang syuhada.'

508.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: Whoever sits in the mosque waiting for prayer is in prayer (counting reward) as long as he waits.'
508.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Barangsiapa duduk di masjid menunggu shalat maka ia dalam keadaan shalat (mendapat pahala) selama ia menunggu.'

509.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a military expedition and performed great deeds. The Prophet ﷺ said he would be in the Fire. The companions were astonished. When the man was later severely wounded he killed himself. The Prophet ﷺ was told and said: 'I bear witness that I am the servant of Allah and His Messenger' — referring to the hadith that deeds are judged by their ending.',
509.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam suatu ekspedisi militer dan melakukan perbuatan yang luar biasa. Nabi ﷺ berkata bahwa ia akan berada di neraka. Para sahabat terheran-heran. Ketika laki-laki itu kemudian terluka parah ia bunuh diri. Nabi ﷺ diberitahu dan bersabda: 'Aku bersaksi bahwa aku adalah hamba Allah dan Rasul-Nya' — mengacu pada hadits bahwa amal dinilai berdasarkan akhirnya.

510.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had ever eaten refined white bread. He said: 'The Prophet ﷺ never saw refined white bread with his own eyes until he met Allah.' He was asked: 'Did you have sieves in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ?' He said: 'We had no sieves.' He was asked how they prepared barley, and he said: 'We would blow on it and whatever flew away, flew away.'
510.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ pernah makan roti putih halus. Ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ tidak pernah melihat roti putih halus dengan matanya sendiri hingga beliau bertemu Allah.' Ia ditanya: 'Apakah kalian memiliki ayakan pada zaman Rasulullah ﷺ?' Ia berkata: 'Kami tidak memiliki ayakan.' Ia ditanya bagaimana mereka mempersiapkan gandum, dan ia berkata: 'Kami meniupnya dan apa yang terbang, terbanglah.'

511.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ at al-Khandaq (the trench). They were digging and we were carrying the earth on our shoulders. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: O Allah, there is no life except the life of the Hereafter, so forgive the Muhajirun and the Ansar.'
511.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di al-Khandaq (parit). Mereka menggali dan kami membawa tanah di bahu kami. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Ya Allah, tidak ada kehidupan kecuali kehidupan akhirat, maka ampunilah kaum Muhajirin dan Ansar.'

512.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that there was fighting among Banu 'Amr ibn 'Awf. The Prophet ﷺ came to settle it after Zuhr. When the Prophet ﷺ arrived and joined the congregation, Abu Bakr was leading prayer. The Prophet ﷺ signaled to Abu Bakr to continue, but Abu Bakr stepped back. The Prophet ﷺ came forward and led the prayer. Afterward he asked Abu Bakr: 'What was the matter with you when I motioned to you?'
512.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa terjadi pertengkaran di antara Banu 'Amr ibn 'Awf. Nabi ﷺ datang untuk mendamaikan mereka setelah Zuhur. Ketika Nabi ﷺ tiba dan bergabung dengan jamaah, Abu Bakr sedang memimpin shalat. Nabi ﷺ memberi isyarat kepada Abu Bakr untuk melanjutkan, tetapi Abu Bakr mundur. Nabi ﷺ maju dan memimpin shalat. Setelahnya beliau bertanya kepada Abu Bakr: 'Ada apa denganmu ketika aku memberi isyarat kepadamu?'

513.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the same incident of Abu Bakr leading prayer and the Prophet ﷺ arriving to take over was narrated through another chain. Abu Bakr said: 'When I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ I stepped back, and he motioned to me to continue, so I went forward.' This is a variant transmission of the same event.
513.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa kejadian yang sama tentang Abu Bakr memimpin shalat dan Nabi ﷺ tiba untuk mengambil alih diriwayatkan melalui sanad lain. Abu Bakr berkata: 'Ketika aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ aku mundur, dan beliau memberi isyarat kepadaku untuk melanjutkan, maka aku maju.' Ini adalah riwayat varian dari kejadian yang sama.

514.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Indeed Paradise has a gate called al-Rayyan. On the Day of Resurrection it will be said: Where are the fasters? Come to al-Rayyan. When the last of them enters, that gate will be closed.'
514.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya surga memiliki sebuah pintu yang disebut al-Rayyan. Pada hari kiamat akan dikatakan: Di manakah orang-orang yang berpuasa? Kemarilah ke al-Rayyan. Ketika yang terakhir dari mereka masuk, pintu itu akan ditutup.'

515.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Indeed Paradise has a gate called al-Rayyan. On the Day of Resurrection it will be said: Where are the fasters? When they enter it will be closed, and none other than them will enter through it.'
515.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya surga memiliki sebuah pintu yang disebut al-Rayyan. Pada hari kiamat akan dikatakan: Di manakah orang-orang yang berpuasa? Ketika mereka masuk pintu itu akan ditutup, dan tidak ada selain mereka yang akan masuk melaluinya.'

516.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I and the one who sponsors an orphan will be like these two in Paradise' — and he pointed with his index finger and middle finger, spreading them slightly apart.
516.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku dan orang yang menanggung anak yatim akan seperti dua ini di surga' — dan beliau menunjuk dengan jari telunjuk dan jari tengahnya, merenggangkan keduanya sedikit.

517.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said on the day of Khaybar: 'I will give this banner tomorrow to a man who loves Allah and His Messenger, and through whom Allah will grant victory.' The companions were eager. In the morning he asked for 'Ali ibn Abi Talib. He was told 'Ali had sore eyes. He sent for him, and when brought, the Prophet ﷺ spat in his eyes and prayed for him. He was cured as though he had never had pain. The Prophet ﷺ gave him the banner.
517.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda pada hari Khaybar: 'Aku akan memberikan bendera ini besok kepada seorang laki-laki yang mencintai Allah dan Rasul-Nya, dan melaluinya Allah akan memberikan kemenangan.' Para sahabat antusias. Di pagi harinya beliau meminta 'Ali ibn Abi Talib. Dikatakan bahwa 'Ali sakit matanya. Beliau mengutus seseorang menjemputnya, dan ketika dibawa, Nabi ﷺ meludah di matanya dan mendoakannya. Ia sembuh seolah tidak pernah sakit. Nabi ﷺ memberikan bendera itu kepadanya.

518.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Prophet ﷺ say: 'I will be your forerunner at the Pond (al-Hawd). Whoever comes to it will drink, and whoever drinks from it will never be thirsty again.' Some people will be barred from the Prophet ﷺ at the Pond, and he will say: 'They are from me.' But it will be said: 'You do not know what they did after you.' He will say: 'Away with them!'
518.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku akan menjadi pendahulumu di Telaga (al-Hawd). Barangsiapa mendatanginya akan minum, dan barangsiapa minum darinya tidak akan pernah haus lagi.' Beberapa orang akan dihalangi dari Nabi ﷺ di Telaga, dan beliau akan berkata: 'Mereka adalah dari umatku.' Tetapi akan dikatakan: 'Engkau tidak tahu apa yang mereka lakukan setelahmu.' Beliau akan berkata: 'Enyahlah mereka!'

519.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever guarantees me what is between his jaws and what is between his legs, I will guarantee him Paradise.'
519.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa menjaminkan kepadaku apa yang ada di antara dua rahangnya dan apa yang ada di antara kedua kakinya, aku akan menjamin surga baginya.'

520.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that a drink was brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he drank from it. To his right was a young boy and to his left were the elders. He asked the young boy: 'Do you permit me to give these elders?' The boy said: 'No, by Allah — I will not give my share from you to anyone.' So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ placed it in his hand.
520.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa sebuah minuman dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau meminumnya. Di sebelah kanannya ada seorang anak laki-laki dan di sebelah kirinya ada para orang tua. Beliau bertanya kepada anak laki-laki itu: 'Apakah kamu mengizinkan aku memberikan kepada para orang tua ini?' Anak laki-laki itu berkata: 'Tidak, demi Allah — aku tidak akan memberikan bagianku darimu kepada siapapun.' Maka Rasulullah ﷺ meletakkannya di tangannya.

521.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with a woven garment with borders. Sahl said: 'Do you know what a burda is? It is a cloak.' A man asked for it and the Prophet ﷺ wore it, then gave it to the man. The people criticized the man, saying the Prophet ﷺ needed it and he had asked for it knowing the Prophet ﷺ does not refuse. The man said: 'I asked for it only to be my burial shroud.'
521.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang wanita datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dengan kain tenun bertepi. Sahl berkata: 'Apakah kamu tahu apa itu burda? Itu adalah jubah.' Seorang laki-laki memintanya dan Nabi ﷺ memakainya, kemudian memberikannya kepada laki-laki itu. Orang-orang mengkritik laki-laki itu, mengatakan Nabi ﷺ membutuhkannya dan ia memintanya dengan mengetahui bahwa Nabi ﷺ tidak pernah menolak. Laki-laki itu berkata: 'Aku memintanya hanya untuk dijadikan kain kafanku.'

522.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I witnessed a gathering of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in which he described Paradise until he finished, then said at the end of his speech: In it is what no eye has seen, no ear has heard, and what has not occurred to the heart of any human.' Then he recited: {Their sides forsake their beds, calling upon their Lord in fear and hope}.
522.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku menyaksikan sebuah majelis Rasulullah ﷺ di mana beliau menggambarkan surga hingga selesai, kemudian berkata di akhir pembicaraannya: Di dalamnya terdapat apa yang tidak pernah dilihat mata, tidak pernah didengar telinga, dan tidak pernah terlintas di hati manusia mana pun.' Kemudian beliau membaca: {Lambung mereka jauh dari tempat tidurnya, mereka berdoa kepada Tuhannya dengan rasa takut dan harap}.

523.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ disliked questions and criticized them. This refers to unnecessary questioning about religious matters and hypothetical scenarios that had not occurred.
523.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ tidak menyukai pertanyaan-pertanyaan dan mengecamnya. Ini merujuk pada pertanyaan yang tidak perlu tentang masalah agama dan skenario hipotetis yang belum terjadi.

524.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The people will continue to be in a good state as long as they hasten to break the fast.'
524.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang-orang akan terus berada dalam keadaan baik selama mereka menyegerakan berbuka puasa.'

525.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw Fatimah, the daughter of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, on the day of Uhud. She burned a piece of matting and placed the ash on the wound on the face of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. A shield full of water was brought and she washed the blood from him.'
525.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Fatimah, putri Rasulullah ﷺ, pada hari Uhud. Ia membakar sepotong tikar dan meletakkan abunya di luka di wajah Rasulullah ﷺ. Sebuah perisai berisi air dibawa dan ia mencuci darah dari beliau.'

526.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that 'Uwaymir came to 'Asim ibn 'Adi and asked him to ask the Prophet ﷺ about a man who found another man with his wife. The Prophet ﷺ ordered them to perform li'an (mutual imprecation). After li'an, 'Uwaymir said: 'If I keep her I have lied about her,' and he divorced her before the Prophet ﷺ ordered it. This became the established practice for those who perform li'an.
526.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa 'Uwaymir datang kepada 'Asim ibn 'Adi dan memintanya untuk bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang seorang laki-laki yang mendapati laki-laki lain bersama istrinya. Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan mereka untuk melakukan li'an (saling melaknat). Setelah li'an, 'Uwaymir berkata: 'Jika aku mempertahankannya aku telah berbohong tentangnya,' dan ia menceraikannya sebelum Nabi ﷺ memerintahkannya. Ini menjadi praktik yang ditetapkan bagi mereka yang melakukan li'an.

527.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that when 'Uwaymir of Banu al-'Ajlan performed li'an with his wife, he said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I would wrong her if I keep her.' And she was separated from him. Then a woman came to the Prophet ﷺ offering herself, and a man asked to marry her, and the Prophet ﷺ married her to him with what he knew of the Quran as a dowry.
527.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika 'Uwaymir dari Banu al-'Ajlan melakukan li'an dengan istrinya, ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku akan mendzaliminya jika aku mempertahankannya.' Dan ia dipisahkan darinya. Kemudian seorang wanita datang kepada Nabi ﷺ menawarkan dirinya, dan seorang laki-laki meminta untuk menikahinya, dan Nabi ﷺ menikahkan keduanya dengan apa yang ia hafal dari Al-Quran sebagai mahar.

528.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man peeked at the Prophet ﷺ through the curtain of his chamber. The Prophet ﷺ had a comb in his hand and said: 'If I had known that this one was watching me until I came to him, I would have stabbed his eye with it. Permission to enter was only ordained because of the need to guard the sight.'
528.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki mengintip Nabi ﷺ melalui tirai kamarnya. Nabi ﷺ memiliki sisir di tangannya dan bersabda: 'Jika aku tahu bahwa orang ini sedang mengamatiku hingga aku mendatanginya, aku akan menusuk matanya dengannya. Izin masuk hanya diwajibkan karena kebutuhan untuk menjaga pandangan.'

529.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'I and the Hour have been sent like these two' — and he raised his index finger and middle finger together, indicating their closeness.
529.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku dan Kiamat diutus seperti dua ini' — dan beliau mengangkat jari telunjuk dan jari tengahnya bersama-sama, menunjukkan kedekatannya.

530.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'A man may perform the deeds of the people of the Fire while he is among the people of Paradise, and a man may perform the deeds of the people of Paradise while he is among the people of the Fire. Indeed deeds are judged by their endings.'
530.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang laki-laki mungkin melakukan amalan orang-orang neraka sementara ia termasuk orang-orang surga, dan seorang laki-laki mungkin melakukan amalan orang-orang surga sementara ia termasuk orang-orang neraka. Sesungguhnya amal dinilai berdasarkan akhirnya.'

531.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If there is evil omen in anything, it is in the horse, the woman, and the dwelling' — meaning bad luck.
531.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika ada kesialan dalam sesuatu, maka ada pada kuda, wanita, dan tempat tinggal' — yaitu maksudnya nasib buruk.

532.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son 'Abbas that the Prophet ﷺ told 'Asim ibn 'Adi about a child born to a woman who performed li'an: if the child had such-and-such characteristics, he would belong to the husband; if he had a dark tongue, he would be Ibn al-Sahma's. When the child was born and 'Asim inspected it, his head was like a small lamb's fleece and his tongue was black like a date. 'Asim said: 'Allah and His Messenger spoke the truth.'
532.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui putranya 'Abbas bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberitahu 'Asim ibn 'Adi tentang seorang anak yang lahir dari wanita yang melakukan li'an: jika anak tersebut memiliki ciri-ciri tertentu, ia akan menjadi milik suami; jika ia memiliki lidah hitam, ia adalah putra Ibn al-Sahma'. Ketika anak itu lahir dan 'Asim memeriksanya, kepalanya seperti bulu domba kecil dan lidahnya hitam seperti kurma. 'Asim berkata: 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya berkata benar.'

533.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when asked about the mosque founded on piety, would say: 'It is my mosque.'
533.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, ketika ditanya tentang masjid yang didirikan atas ketakwaan, bersabda: 'Itu adalah masjidku.'

534.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Seventy thousand — or seven hundred thousand — of my nation will enter Paradise without reckoning.'
534.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tujuh puluh ribu — atau tujuh ratus ribu — dari umatku akan masuk surga tanpa hisab.'

535.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The believer is one who is approachable and sociable. There is no good in one who is not approachable and is not befriended.'
535.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang mukmin adalah orang yang mudah didekati dan bersahabat. Tidak ada kebaikan pada orang yang tidak mudah didekati dan tidak disukai.'

536.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'My minbar is upon one of the gateways of Paradise.' He was asked: 'What is a turfa (gateway), O Abu al-'Abbas?' He said: 'A door.'
536.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mimbarku berada di atas salah satu gerbang surga.' Ia ditanya: 'Apakah turfa (gerbang) itu, wahai Abu al-'Abbas?' Ia berkata: 'Sebuah pintu.'

537.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The fasters have a gate in Paradise called al-Rayyan. None other than them will enter through it. When the last of them enters it will be closed. Whoever enters through it will drink, and whoever drinks from it will never be thirsty again.'
537.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang-orang yang berpuasa memiliki sebuah pintu di surga yang disebut al-Rayyan. Tidak ada selain mereka yang akan masuk melaluinya. Ketika yang terakhir dari mereka masuk pintu itu akan ditutup. Barangsiapa masuk melaluinya akan minum, dan barangsiapa minum darinya tidak akan pernah haus lagi.'

538.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ disliked questions and criticized them. This refers to unnecessary questioning in religious matters.
538.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ tidak menyukai pertanyaan-pertanyaan dan mengecamnya. Ini merujuk pada pertanyaan yang tidak perlu dalam masalah agama.

539.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Going out in the morning or evening in the path of Allah is better than the world and everything in it.'
539.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berangkat di pagi hari atau sore hari di jalan Allah lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya.'

540.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Saying SubhanAllah during prayer is for men, and clapping is for women.'
540.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mengucapkan SubhanAllah dalam shalat adalah untuk laki-laki, dan bertepuk tangan adalah untuk wanita.'

541.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The people will continue to be in a good state as long as they hasten to break the fast.'
541.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang-orang akan terus berada dalam keadaan baik selama mereka menyegerakan berbuka puasa.'

542.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We used to take our midday rest and eat lunch after Jumu'ah prayer with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
542.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami biasa beristirahat siang dan makan siang setelah shalat Jum'at bersama Rasulullah ﷺ.'

543.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ went to Banu 'Amr ibn 'Awf during a dispute between them. The Prophet ﷺ then arrived at the mosque while Abu Bakr was leading prayer. The Prophet ﷺ walked through the rows and Abu Bakr saw him and stepped back, but the Prophet ﷺ motioned to him to stay in his place. Abu Bakr stepped back and the Prophet ﷺ came forward and led the prayer.
543.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ pergi ke Banu 'Amr ibn 'Awf selama perselisihan di antara mereka. Kemudian Nabi ﷺ tiba di masjid sementara Abu Bakr sedang memimpin shalat. Nabi ﷺ berjalan melalui barisan dan Abu Bakr melihatnya dan mundur, tetapi Nabi ﷺ memberi isyarat kepadanya untuk tetap di tempatnya. Abu Bakr mundur dan Nabi ﷺ maju dan memimpin shalat.

544.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that people were commanded to place the right hand over the left in prayer. Abu Hazim said: 'I know only that he attributed this to the Prophet ﷺ' — meaning it was a prophetic practice.
544.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa orang-orang diperintahkan untuk meletakkan tangan kanan di atas tangan kiri dalam shalat. Abu Hazim berkata: 'Aku hanya tahu bahwa ia menisbatkan ini kepada Nabi ﷺ' — berarti ini adalah praktik kenabian.

545.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that a woman came to the Prophet ﷺ offering herself to him. When a man asked to marry her, the Prophet ﷺ asked if he could find anything as a dowry. He could find nothing, not even an iron ring. The Prophet ﷺ asked if he had any Quran. He said yes — such-and-such surahs. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'I give her to you in marriage for what you have of the Quran.'
545.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang wanita datang kepada Nabi ﷺ menawarkan dirinya kepada beliau. Ketika seorang laki-laki meminta untuk menikahinya, Nabi ﷺ bertanya apakah ia bisa menemukan sesuatu sebagai mahar. Ia tidak bisa menemukan apa pun, bahkan cincin besi sekalipun. Nabi ﷺ bertanya apakah ia memiliki Al-Quran. Ia menjawab ya — surah ini dan surah itu. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku menikahkan kamu dengannya dengan apa yang kamu miliki dari Al-Quran.'

546.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that 'Uwaymir al-'Ajlani came to 'Asim ibn 'Adi and sent him to ask the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'What do you think of a man who finds another man with his wife — does he kill him and you kill him, or what does he do?' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Allah has revealed regarding you and your companion.' He ordered them to perform li'an. Sahl said: 'They performed li'an and I was among the people at that time.'
546.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa 'Uwaymir al-'Ajlani datang kepada 'Asim ibn 'Adi dan mengutusnya untuk bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Apa pendapatmu tentang seorang laki-laki yang mendapati laki-laki lain bersama istrinya — apakah ia membunuhnya dan kamu membunuhnya, atau apa yang ia lakukan?' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah telah menurunkan wahyu mengenai kamu dan temanmu.' Beliau memerintahkan mereka untuk melakukan li'an. Sahl berkata: 'Mereka melakukan li'an dan aku berada di antara orang-orang saat itu.'

547.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl (may Allah be pleased with him) that an Ansari man came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and asked about a man who found another man with his wife. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Allah has revealed regarding your matter what is mentioned in the Quran about li'an.' He ordered them to perform li'an. Sahl said: 'They performed li'an and I was a witness, then the husband separated from her in the presence of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
547.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki Ansari datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan bertanya tentang seorang laki-laki yang mendapati laki-laki lain bersama istrinya. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah telah menurunkan mengenai urusanmu apa yang disebutkan dalam Al-Quran tentang li'an.' Beliau memerintahkan mereka untuk melakukan li'an. Sahl berkata: 'Mereka melakukan li'an dan aku menjadi saksi, kemudian suami itu berpisah dari istrinya di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ.'

548.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son 'Abbas that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lean against a palm trunk when delivering the sermon. When the people multiplied, he said: 'If only I had something to sit on.' Sahl's father went and cut the wood of the minbar from al-Ghaba forest. 'Abbas said: 'I do not know if my father made it or had it made.'
548.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui putranya 'Abbas bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bersandar pada batang pohon kurma ketika menyampaikan khutbah. Ketika orang-orang bertambah banyak, beliau berkata: 'Seandainya aku memiliki sesuatu untuk duduk.' Ayah Sahl pergi dan memotong kayu mimbar dari hutan al-Ghaba. 'Abbas berkata: 'Aku tidak tahu apakah ayahku yang membuatnya atau menyuruh orang lain membuatnya.'

549.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ raising his hands in supplication except during the prayer for rain (istisqa), and he would raise them until the whiteness of his armpits could be seen.' This relates to the incident of 'Uwaymir's li'an case and its background.
549.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ mengangkat kedua tangannya dalam doa kecuali saat shalat istisqa (minta hujan), dan beliau mengangkat keduanya hingga putihnya ketiak beliau terlihat.' Ini berkaitan dengan kejadian li'an 'Uwaymir dan latar belakangnya.

550.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Going out in the morning in the path of Allah is better than the world and everything in it. Going out in the evening in the path of Allah is better than the world and everything in it. And a spot the size of a whip in Paradise is better than the world and everything in it.'
550.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berangkat di pagi hari di jalan Allah lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya. Berangkat di sore hari di jalan Allah lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya. Dan tempat seluas cambuk di surga lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya.'
